title: Squirrel Removal West Village, Manhattan | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in West Village, Manhattan. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving brownstones & historic buildings. Call today!
intro: West Village residents know that squirrels are as much a part of the neighborhood charm as the tree-lined streets and historic brownstones—until they invade your attic or walls. Our professional squirrel removal services provide humane, effective solutions tailored to the unique architecture of West Village homes and buildings. From Washington Square Park to the Hudson River waterfront, we protect your property with safe extraction and long-term prevention.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in squirrel removal for West Village's distinctive brownstones, co-ops, and landmarked buildings, with expertise in navigating historic preservation requirements. Our licensed technicians use humane methods and provide comprehensive exclusion services to ensure squirrels don't return, all while respecting the architectural integrity of your Greenwich Village property.
localContext: West Village's mature trees along streets like Bleecker, Perry, and Charles provide ideal habitat for gray squirrels, which frequently seek entry into attics, chimneys, and roof spaces of the neighborhood's 19th-century townhouses and pre-war buildings. The area's proximity to Washington Square Park and the Hudson River Greenway creates a thriving squirrel population that often conflicts with residential spaces in this densely packed historic district.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in West Village?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in West Village typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. Historic brownstones may require specialized work that affects pricing, and we provide detailed estimates after a thorough inspection of your property.

faqs.question: Are squirrels damaging my West Village brownstone or apartment?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through wooden beams, electrical wiring, insulation, and roof materials common in West Village buildings. They also create noise disturbances, leave droppings that pose health risks, and their urine can damage ceilings and walls. Early removal prevents costly repairs to your historic property.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in West Village?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all NYC and New York State regulations for humane wildlife removal. Our methods include live trapping and relocation when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors, and sealing entry points to prevent re-entry. We never use poisons or inhumane methods, ensuring ethical treatment while solving your squirrel problem.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my West Village home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for West Village residents in most cases. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of entry points. We'll secure your property immediately and monitor traps daily until all squirrels are removed, followed by permanent exclusion work to prevent future infestations.
